title: 皐月賞の後に・魂は同じ色

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fight for first place in the Satsuki Sho is more
intense than we could've predicted, and Tamamo
Cross loses out on the crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she finds an unlikely friend in Gold
City, whose flashy looks also make her a target.
Recognizing each other's skills, the two vow to
keep fighting in future races.
